allow: PowerShell($srcRoot = "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/Lagless-Docs/public"; $dstRoot = "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website/public"; foreach \($folder in @\("images","docs"\)\) { $s = Join-Path $srcRoot $folder; $d = Join-Path $dstRoot $folder; if \(Test-Path $s\) { robocopy $s $d /E /XO /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; Write-Output "copied: $folder" } }; "asset count: $\(\(Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dstRoot/images,$dstRoot/docs -File | Measure-Object\).Count\)")
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website"; pnpm exec next build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website"; pnpm exec next build 2>&1 | Select-String "docs|error|Error" | Select-Object -First 25; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; pnpm exec next build 2>&1 | Select-String "docs|error|Error|Failed" | Select-Object -First 30; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; pnpm exec next build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|Failed|docs/\\[" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 30; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:/Users/anderson/Documents/lagless-website"; \(pnpm exec next build 2>&1 | Out-String\) -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "/docs" } | Select-Object -First 80)
